name: easy-headroom
description: Installs, configures, and manages RTK and Headroom automatically to reduce token consumption for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI.

easy-headroom.projectName.description: Project name used for Headroom's per-project attribution (/p/<slug>). Empty = auto-detected from the workspace/folder name. Set this (e.g. in a committed .vscode/settings.json) when that auto-detected name doesn't match the name you want Headroom to report under.

easy-headroom.rtk.enabled.description: Install and enable RTK (shell output compression)

easy-headroom.rtk.agents.description: Which CLI agents to set up RTK for (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI). Each is installed/patched independently.

easy-headroom.rtk.pinnedVersion.description: Pin RTK to a specific version (e.g. v0.43.0). Empty = always install/update to latest. Use the 'easy-headroom: Select RTK Version' command to pick from detected releases.

easy-headroom.headroom.enabled.description: Install and/or use Headroom (proxy compression + cache + output shaping)

easy-headroom.headroom.mode.description: local = headroom proxy spawned and managed on this machine ; remote = use an already-deployed Headroom proxy elsewhere

easy-headroom.headroom.remoteUrl.description: URL of the remote Headroom proxy (required if mode = remote)

easy-headroom.headroom.proxyToken.description: Token for the remote Headroom bundle (headroom.remoteUrl), must match its HEADROOM_PROXY_TOKEN — sent as X-Headroom-Proxy-Token on both the RTK stats reporting endpoint and every proxied Claude Code request (via ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS, remote mode only)

easy-headroom.headroom.localPort.description: Local Headroom proxy port (mode = local only)

easy-headroom.headroom.pinnedVersion.description: Pin Headroom to a specific version (e.g. 0.31.0). Empty = always install/update to latest. Use the 'easy-headroom: Select Headroom Version' command to pick from detected releases.
